units.prompt: The Spanish word for the baked food made from flour (bread)
The Spanish word for the clear drinking liquid (water)
The Spanish word for the white drink from cows (milk)
The Spanish word for sweet plant food (fruit)
The Spanish word for animal flesh as food (meat)
The Spanish word for the white grain you boil and eat (rice)
The Spanish word for the round food that comes from chickens (egg)
The Spanish word for the food that swims in water (fish)
The Spanish word for the yellow food made from milk (cheese)
The Spanish word for the hot black drink in the morning (coffee)
